notes: • Crash recovery — unclean exit (End Task/freeze) → next launch offers reset settings, copy report, report on GitHub. Normal quit after a crash popup → no nag.
• Playback engine — queue/advance/shuffle/repeat/autoplay driven more from Python; continuous playback, repeat-all, shuffle and queue end fixes
• Image Viewer viz — determined simulated-only is the only real option for streaming audio; improved procedural motion and progress ring
• Particle FX — bubbles improved, snow, rain and blizzard wait until viewport edge to despawn
• Playlist — drag URL QOL improvements - custom placement, drop line + scroll while dragging, album/tracks stay in view. Item Selection improved
• Fan login — smarter restore; theme correct after login.
• Startup — faster/cleaner boot; single-instance on by default.
